mapper.sql: id, activity_id, user_id, participate_time, status, participant_rank, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO u_activity_participant ( activity_id, user_id, participate_time, status, participant_rank, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{participateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{participantRank,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE u_activity_participant SET status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM u_activity_participant WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 0

SELECT
FROM u_activity_participant WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 0 ORDER BY participate_time ASC
